arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal’s first Vlahovic bid rejected by Juventus
arts.sum: Arsenal made an offer for Vlahovic on loan at the end of last week, yet it was rejected by Juventus, who want to sell the player outright or at least include an obligation to buy in any temporary deal that is struck. Arsenal have made a first bid for Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic but have had their loan offer for the Serbia international hitman rejected by the Serie A giants.

arts.ttl: Juventus Face Dilemma as Vlahovic Likely to Miss Atalanta Clash
arts.sum: Juventus are bracing for another challenging match as star striker Dusan Vlahovic is expected to miss the upcoming game against Atalanta due to ongoing muscle fatigue. Thiago Motta, the team's coach, had previously indicated that Vlahovic's participation would depend on his performance in training, but recent updates suggest that he has not recovered sufficiently. The post Juventus Face Dilemma as Vlahovic Likely to Miss Atalanta Clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus Target Kolo Muani: Giuntoli Plans Paris Mission
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make their first move in the January transfer window with the acquisition of 21-year-old right-back Alberto Costa from Vitoria Guimaraes. This €15 million investment addresses the immediate need left by Danilo's impending departure and aligns with the club's future plans. However, Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli has his sights set on bigger targets, particularly in central defense and attack. The post Juventus Target Kolo Muani: Giuntoli Plans Paris Mission appeared first on FootItalia.com.
